description: Style NoteThis T-shirt from quiksilver is perfect for the cosmopolitan male who's fixated on the minimal mood of the moment. The tee is an off-duty essential in every cosmopolitan man's wardrobe, wear it with denims and a jacket for a weekend in the great outdoors. You'll look great with casual shoes and an understated belt.Product DetailsWhite T-shirt, as a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and graphic print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldDo not tumble, bleach or iron on print / decorationsUse cool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size L
